results.question: How many distinct states are represented in the data?
How many mortality records have an age-adjusted rate greater than 100?
What is the average number of deaths recorded in mortality records where the label contains '2010'?

per_seed.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG("deaths"), 2) FROM "MortalityRecord" JOIN "Decade" ON "MortalityRecord"."decade_id" = "Decade"."decade_id" WHERE "Decade"."decade_label" LIKE '%2010%';

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table MortalityRecord: 10868 rows (from MortalityRecord.csv)
CREATE TABLE "MortalityRecord" (
  "record_id" TEXT,
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "cause_id" TEXT,
  "state_id" TEXT,
  "region_id" TEXT,
  "decade_id" TEXT,
  "cause_category_id" TEXT,
  "deaths" INTEGER,
  "age_adjusted_rate" REAL
);
-- sample rows from MortalityRecord:
--   record_id='2017__unintentional_injuries__US', year_id='2017', cause_id='unintentional_injuries', state_id='US', region_id='national', decade_id='2010s', cause_category_id='injury', deaths='169936', age_adjusted_rate='49.4'
--   record_id='2017__unintentional_injuries__AL', year_id='2017', cause_id='unintentional_injuries', state_id='AL', region_id='south', decade_id='2010s', cause_category_id='injury', deaths='2703', age_adjusted_rate='53.8'

-- Table Cause: 11 rows (from Cause.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Cause" (
  "cause_id" TEXT,
  "cause_name" TEXT,
  "icd_description" TEXT,
  "cause_category_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Cause:
--   cause_id='unintentional_injuries', cause_name='Unintentional injuries', icd_description='Accidents (unintentional injuries) (V01-', cause_category_id='injury'
--   cause_id='all_causes', cause_name='All causes', icd_description='All Causes', cause_category_id='all_causes'

-- Table CauseCategory: 4 rows (from CauseCategory.csv)
CREATE TABLE "CauseCategory" (
  "cause_category_id" TEXT,
  "cause_category_name" TEXT,
  "cause_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from CauseCategory:
--   cause_category_id='all_causes', cause_category_name='All Causes (Roll-up)', cause_count='1'
--   cause_category_id='chronic_disease', cause_category_name='Chronic Disease', cause_count='7'

-- Table State: 52 rows (from State.csv)
CREATE TABLE "State" (
  "state_id" TEXT,
  "state_name" TEXT,
  "region_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from State:
--   state_id='US', state_name='United States', region_id='national'
--   state_id='AL', state_name='Alabama', region_id='south'

-- Table Region: 5 rows (from Region.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Region" (
  "region_id" TEXT,
  "region_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Region:
--   region_id='national', region_name='National'
--   region_id='south', region_name='South'

-- Table Year: 19 rows (from Year.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Year" (
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "year" INTEGER,
  "decade_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Year:
--   year_id='2017', year='2017', decade_id='2010s'
--   year_id='2007', year='2007', decade_id='2000s'

-- Table Decade: 3 rows (from Decade.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Decade" (
  "decade_id" TEXT,
  "decade_label" TEXT,
  "start_year" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Decade:
--   decade_id='2010s', decade_label='2010s', start_year='2010'
--   decade_id='2000s', decade_label='2000s', start_year='2000'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Cause.cause_id -> CauseCategory.cause_category_id
--   Cause.cause_id -> MortalityRecord.record_id
--   CauseCategory.cause_category_id -> Cause.cause_id
--   Decade.decade_id -> Year.year_id
--   MortalityRecord.record_id -> Cause.cause_id
--   MortalityRecord.record_id -> Region.region_id
--   MortalityRecord.record_id -> State.state_id
--   MortalityRecord.record_id -> Year.year_id
--   Region.region_id -> MortalityRecord.record_id
--   Region.region_id -> State.state_id
--   State.state_id -> MortalityRecord.record_id
--   State.state_id -> Region.region_id
--   Year.year_id -> Decade.decade_id
--   Year.year_id -> MortalityRecord.record_id
